# Template Geometries

Pixel-level gauge position arrays. Format: `[x, y, width, height]`.

Position numbering starts at `"2"` — position "2" = gauges[0], "3" = gauges[1], etc.

## iPhone Templates (baseSize: [375, 667])

**"Three"** — 3 positions (2 small top + 1 hero bottom)
```json
{"baseSize":[375,667],"gauges":[[1,0,188,204.4],[187,0,188,204],[1,204,374,463]]}
```

**"TwoByThree"** — 6 positions (2x3 grid)
```json
{"baseSize":[375,667],"gauges":[[0,0,187.5,222.3],[187.5,0,187.5,222.3],[0,222.3,187.5,222.3],[187.5,222.3,187.5,222.3],[0,444.7,187.5,222.3],[187.5,444.7,187.5,222.3]]}
```

**"6x6"** — 8 positions (2x4 grid)
```json
{"baseSize":[375,667],"gauges":[[1.3,0,187.5,166],[186.1,0,188.9,166],[0,165.8,187.5,166],[187.5,165.8,187.5,166],[0,331.8,187.5,166],[187.5,331.8,187.5,166],[0,497.8,187.5,166],[187.5,497.8,187.5,166]]}
```

**"LargeBottomView"** — 10 positions (3x3 + hero bottom)
```json
{"baseSize":[375,667],"gauges":[[0,0,125,144],[125,0,125,144],[249.9,0,125,144],[0,143.4,125,144],[125,143.4,125,144],[249.9,144,125,144],[0,287.4,125,144],[125,287.4,125,144],[250,287.4,125,144],[0,431.4,374.5,235.6]]}
```

**"BottomTextView"** — 12 positions (3x3 + bottom section)
```json
{"baseSize":[375,667],"gauges":[[0,0,125,144],[125,0,125,144],[250,0,125,144],[0,144,125,144],[125,144,125,144],[250,144,125,144],[0,288,125,144],[125,288,125,144],[250,288,125,144],[0,432,125,117],[125,432,250,234.4],[0,549,125,117]]}
```

**"ThreeByFive"** — 15 positions (3x5 grid)
```json
{"baseSize":[375,667],"gauges":[[0,0,125,133.4],[125,0,125,133.4],[250,0,125,133.4],[0,133.4,125,133.4],[125,133.4,125,133.4],[250,133.4,125,133.4],[0,266.8,125,133.4],[125,266.8,125,133.4],[250,266.8,125,133.4],[0,400.2,125,133.4],[125,400.2,125,133.4],[250,400.2,125,133.4],[0,533.6,125,133.4],[125,533.6,125,133.4],[250,533.6,125,133.4]]}
```

**"1"** — 24 positions (4x6 dense grid)
```json
{"baseSize":[375,667],"gauges":[[0,0,93.8,111.2],[93.8,0,93.8,111.2],[187.5,0,93.8,111.2],[281.2,0,93.8,111.2],[0,111.2,93.8,111.2],[93.8,111.2,93.8,111.2],[187.5,111.2,93.8,111.2],[281.2,111.2,93.8,111.2],[0,222.3,93.8,111.2],[93.8,222.3,93.8,111.2],[187.5,222.3,93.8,111.2],[281.2,222.3,93.8,111.2],[0,333.5,93.8,111.2],[93.8,333.5,93.8,111.2],[187.5,333.5,93.8,111.2],[281.2,333.5,93.8,111.2],[0,444.7,93.8,111.2],[93.8,444.7,93.8,111.2],[187.5,444.7,93.8,111.2],[281.2,444.7,93.8,111.2],[0,555.8,93.8,111.2],[93.8,555.8,93.8,111.2],[187.5,555.8,93.8,111.2],[281.2,555.8,93.8,111.2]]}
```

## iPad Templates (baseSize: [1024, 721])

**"Basic"** — 15 positions (5x3 + extras)
```json
{"baseSize":[1024,721],"gauges":[[1.7,0,204,204],[205.7,0,204,204],[409.7,0,204,204],[613.7,0,204,204],[817.7,0,204,204],[1.7,204,204,204],[205.7,204,204,204],[409.7,204,204,204],[613.7,204,204,204],[817.7,204,204,204],[1.7,408,204,204],[205.7,408,204,204],[409.7,408,612,312],[1.7,612,204,108],[205.7,612,204,108]]}
```

**"FourByFour"** — 16 positions (4x4 grid)
```json
{"baseSize":[1024,721],"gauges":[[0,0,256,180.2],[256,0,256,180.2],[512,0,256,180.2],[768,0,256,180.2],[0,180.2,256,180.2],[256,180.2,256,180.2],[512,180.2,256,180.2],[768,180.2,256,180.2],[0,360.5,256,180.2],[256,360.5,256,180.2],[512,360.5,256,180.2],[768,360.5,256,180.2],[0,540.8,256,180.2],[256,540.8,256,180.2],[512,540.8,256,180.2],[768,540.8,256,180.2]]}
```

**"3"** — 49 positions (7x7 grid)
```json
{"baseSize":[1024,721],"gauges":[[0,0,146.3,103],[146.3,0,146.3,103],[292.6,0,146.3,103],[438.9,0,146.3,103],[585.1,0,146.3,103],[731.4,0,146.3,103],[877.7,0,146.3,103],[0,103,146.3,103],[146.3,103,146.3,103],[292.6,103,146.3,103],[438.9,103,146.3,103],[585.1,103,146.3,103],[731.4,103,146.3,103],[877.7,103,146.3,103],[0,206,146.3,103],[146.3,206,146.3,103],[292.6,206,146.3,103],[438.9,206,146.3,103],[585.1,206,146.3,103],[731.4,206,146.3,103],[877.7,206,146.3,103],[0,309,146.3,103],[146.3,309,146.3,103],[292.6,309,146.3,103],[438.9,309,146.3,103],[585.1,309,146.3,103],[731.4,309,146.3,103],[877.7,309,146.3,103],[0,412,146.3,103],[146.3,412,146.3,103],[292.6,412,146.3,103],[438.9,412,146.3,103],[585.1,412,146.3,103],[731.4,412,146.3,103],[877.7,412,146.3,103],[0,515,146.3,103],[146.3,515,146.3,103],[292.6,515,146.3,103],[438.9,515,146.3,103],[585.1,515,146.3,103],[731.4,515,146.3,103],[877.7,515,146.3,103],[0,618,146.3,103],[146.3,618,146.3,103],[292.6,618,146.3,103],[438.9,618,146.3,103],[585.1,618,146.3,103],[731.4,618,146.3,103],[877.7,618,146.3,103]]}
```

**"LargeCenterGauge"** — 9 positions (center hero + 8 surrounding)
```json
{"baseSize":[1024,721],"gauges":[[0,0,194,205],[192.9,0,637.1,719],[830,0,194,205],[0,205,194,205],[830,205,194,205],[0,410,193,205],[830,410,194,205],[0,615,192.9,104],[830,615,194,104]]}
```

**"MFD"** — 15 positions (sidebar + bottom grid + large center)
```json
{"baseSize":[1024,721],"gauges":[[0,0,231,205],[0,205,231,205],[0,410,231,205],[0,615,231,106],[231,454.2,126,134],[357,454.2,126,134],[483,454.2,126,134],[609,454.2,126,134],[735,454.2,289,134],[231,588,126,133],[357,588,126,133],[483,588,126,133],[609,588,126,133],[735,588,289,133],[231,0,793,454.2]]}
```
